name: Blackberry Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and salt to the mixture; blend well.
3. Stir in milk until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8 x 8 inch baking dish and cover with blackberries.
5. Bake at 325°F (160°C) to 350°F (180°C) for about 45 minutes.
6. Sprinkle remaining sugar on top of the pudding.
7. Continue baking for an additional 5 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
